content.text:
### PRP Facial Treatment in Katy, Texas

PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) facial treatment, often called a "Vampire Facial," is a non-invasive cosmetic procedure that uses your own blood plasma to stimulate collagen production, reduce wrinkles, improve skin texture, and promote healing. It's popular for anti-aging and skin rejuvenation, sometimes combined with microneedling[[1]](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/injectables-facial-care/prp-facial)[[2]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/microneedling-with-platelet-rich-plasma-prp). In Katy, TX, several clinics offer this service. Based on recent web searches (as of April 2026), here are some top options. I recommend contacting them directly for the latest pricing, availability, and consultations, as details can change.

#### Top Providers in Katy, TX:
- **H-Town Aesthetics**: Specializes in PRP facials and PRF (Platelet-Rich Fibrin) treatments, using your body's healing factors for skin regeneration. Located in Katy, they focus on advanced regenerative therapies[[3]](https://htownaesthetics.com/prp-and-prf-treatments-in-texas).
- **4Ever Young Anti-Aging Clinic and Medical Spa**: Offers PRP facials as a natural, non-chemical way to revitalize skin using your own plasma. It's non-invasive and promotes healing[[1]](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/injectables-facial-care/prp-facial).
- **Aesthetic Master Infusions LLC**: Provides PRP therapy for skin rejuvenation, hair growth, and more. It's a cutting-edge treatment harnessing your body's natural abilities[[4]](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/prp).
- **Clear Dermatology**: Combines microneedling with PRP to generate new collagen, resulting in smoother, firmer skin and reduced acne scars[[2]](https://cleardermatology.com/our-services/skincare-treatments-and-aesthetic/microneedling-with-platelet-rich-plasma-prp).
- **Luxe Medical Aesthetics**: Non-surgical PRP treatments to smooth wrinkles, brighten skin, and restore hair, with no downtime[[5]](https://theluxeeffect.com/our-services/prp).
- **Integrative Primary Care**: PRP specialist services for various needs, including skin and joint issues. Contact them at 225 Bella Katy Dr[[6]](https://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/services/prp).
- **Katy Wellness Center & Family**: Offers PRP therapy for skin and overall wellness, provided by family practice internists[[7]](https://www.katywellnesscenter.com/service/platelet-rich-plasma-therapy-prp).
- **Glow Up MD**: Features advanced anti-aging PRP therapy alongside other treatments like radiofrequency microneedling[[8]](https://glowupmdspa.com/).

For reviews and more options, check Yelp's top-rated PRP therapy spots in Katy, including LaserAway and Oak Street Health[[9]](https://www.yelp.com/search?find_desc=Prp+Therapy&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX). Always consult a licensed professional to ensure it's suitable for your skin type and health. If you need more details on a specific clinic or related treatments, let me know!
